description: The King Cobras are a prominent Pacific gang in New Zealand, founded by Samoans in Ponsonby in the 1950s, making them the oldest gang in the country. Initially restricted to Samoans, they have since accepted other Polynesians. The gang is known for violence, firearms possession, and involvement in drug dealing, including methamphetamine, cocaine, and marijuana. They have been involved in major drug cases and murders.
